description: India Book III,9: Letter from Yosef b. Avraham in Aden to Avraham b. Yiju. Goitein thought that the letter was sent to Zabīd, a coastal town in southwestern Yemen. Friedman claims that Ibn Yiju was still in India and understands the reference to Zabīd not to be part of the address. Goitein dates the letter to 1150, while Friedman dates it to 1148–49. The letter contains many commercial details.
description_he: ספר הודו III,9: מכתב מיוסף בן אברהם, מעדן, לאברהם בן יג'ו, על פרטים מסחריים, 1148-50
